recipe.title: How To Make Fried Chicken Without Frying
recipe.instructions:
Preheat the oven to 200C/400F.
Wash and dry the chicken thighs.
Mince the herbs.
In a bowl put the extra virgin olive oil, the minced herbs, salt and pepper.
Put the chicken inside the bowl and gently massage the chicken with the oil and herbs mixture.
Pass each thigh on the breadcrumbs and put on an oven tray covered with parchment paper.
Cook until well done, from 50 minutes to one hour, depending on your oven and the weight of the chicken pieces.
At half cooking time, turn each piece to the other side.
Prepare a sauce mixing the honey and vinegar.
Five minutes before taking the chicken out of the oven, brush each piece with the sauce.
recipe.summary: How To Make Fried Chicken Without Frying takes around 45 minutes from beginning to end. One portion of this dish contains around 42g of protein, 53g of fat, and a total of 826 calories. This recipe serves 2 and costs $2.19 per serving. It is a good option if you're following a dairy free diet. 15 people were impressed by this recipe. This recipe from Foodista requires chicken thighs, bell pepper, rosemary, and sage. It works well as a main course. This recipe is typical of Southern cuisine. With a spoonacular score of 69%, this dish is good. Frying Peppers, Cherry Tomatoes & Chicken Sausage Saute, How to Make Southern Fried Chicken, and How to Make Buttermilk Fried Chicken are very similar to this recipe.
ingredients: 2 Tbsp of extra virgin olive oil
